description.en: The All-China Women's Federation (ACWF) is the national mass organization representing Chinese women under the leadership of the Chinese Communist Party. Founded in 1949, ACWF works to protect the legal rights and interests of women, promote gender equality, advance women's participation in social, economic, and political life, and support rural women's development. ACWF publishes gender statistics, women's participation data, surveys on women's social status, and research reports on marriage, family, domestic violence, and women's employment. Its Third Survey on the Social Status of Chinese Women is the primary national benchmark for gender equality measurement. ACWF's statistical releases are widely used in gender gap research, UN reporting, and national gender policy evaluation.
description.zh: 中华全国妇女联合会（全国妇联）是在中国共产党领导下的全国性妇女群众组织，成立于1949年。全国妇联致力于维护妇女合法权益、促进男女平等、推动妇女在社会、经济和政治领域的参与，并支持农村妇女发展。全国妇联发布性别统计数据、妇女参与指标、妇女社会地位调查和婚姻家庭、家庭暴力、妇女就业等领域的研究报告。《第三期中国妇女社会地位调查》是衡量性别平等的主要全国基准调查。全国妇联统计数据广泛用于性别差距研究、联合国报告及全国性别政策评估。

en: Women's social status survey: comprehensive decennial survey measuring women's education, employment, income, political participation, marriage, and health
Women's employment: female labor force participation rate, female unemployment, occupational distribution, and gender wage gap data
Women in leadership: share of women in NPC, CPPCC, government positions, enterprise leadership, and village committees
Marriage and divorce: marriage patterns, age at first marriage, divorce rates, and living arrangements
Domestic violence: prevalence statistics, shelter capacity, legal aid cases, and policy implementation data
Rural women: land rights, income, education, and health status of rural women
Women's education: female enrollment rates, educational attainment, and literacy across levels and regions
Women's health: maternal mortality, reproductive health indicators, cancer screening, and health insurance coverage
Children and family welfare: child welfare, single-parent family statistics, and maternity leave uptake
Gender equality indicators: China's progress on SDG 5 (Gender Equality) and national gender mainstreaming benchmarks
zh: 妇女社会地位调查：十年一次的综合调查，衡量妇女教育、就业、收入、政治参与、婚姻及健康状况
妇女就业：女性劳动参与率、失业率、职业分布及性别工资差距数据
妇女参政：女性在全国人大、政协、政府机关、企业领导层及村委会中的比例
婚姻与离婚：婚姻模式、初婚年龄、离婚率及家庭居住安排
家庭暴力：发生率统计、庇护所容量、法律援助案件及政策执行数据
农村妇女：农村妇女土地权益、收入、教育及健康状况
妇女教育：各学段各地区女性入学率、学历层次及识字率
妇女健康：孕产妇死亡率、生殖健康指标、癌症筛查及医疗保险覆盖
儿童和家庭福利：儿童福利、单亲家庭统计及产假使用情况
性别平等指标：中国可持续发展目标第5项（性别平等）进展及国家性别主流化基准
